title: UPMSP UP Board Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: UPMSP UP Board Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: UPMSP Result 2026 out for Class 10th High School and Class 12th Intermediate on the official website - upmsp.edu.in on 23-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and follow the steps to download the UP Board Class 10th and 12th result using your roll number.

content.text: The Uttar Pradesh Madhyamik Shiksha Parishad (UPMSP) has officially released the UP Board Class 10th and 12th Result 2026 for the 2025-26 academic session. The UP Board 2026 results have been declared for High School (Class 10) and Intermediate (Class 12) students who appeared in the February-March 2026 board examinations.

UPMSP Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - upmsp.edu.in. Students of both classes can check and download their UP Board marksheet by visiting the official result portals and logging in with their roll number and other required details as given on their admit card. After downloading the provisional scorecard, candidates must carefully verify their name, roll number, subjects, marks and overall result status, and contact UPMSP or their respective schools immediately in case of any discrepancy.

sections.heading: UPMSP UP Board Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: UPMSP has published the UP Board Class 10th and 12th Result 2026 online for lakhs of High School and Intermediate students across the state for the 2025-26 academic year. Students can access their UPMSP Result 2026 through official websites like upmsp.edu.in and upresults.nic.in by entering their roll number and district or school code. The online marksheet is provisional and will be valid for immediate reference until the original mark sheets are distributed by the respective schools.

rows: UP Board High School (Class 10) and Intermediate (Class 12) Exam 2026
Class 10th High School and Class 12th Intermediate

sections.heading: UPMSP UP Board Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: UPMSP has activated the direct links to check UP Board Class 10th and 12th Result 2026 on its official portals for all registered students. High School and Intermediate candidates can open the UPMSP Result 2026 direct link, enter their roll number and other details, and instantly view or download their marksheet online. The official result links for UP Board 10th and 12th are given below so that students can access their scorecards from the UPMSP websites without any confusion.

links.label: UPMSP UP Board Class 10th High School Result 2026
UPMSP UP Board Class 12th Intermediate Result 2026

sections.heading: How to Check UP Board Class 10th 12th Result 2026

content.text: Students can follow the steps given below to check UPMSP UP Board Result 2026 online in a simple and error-free manner.

items: Open any web browser and visit the official UP Board website - upmsp.edu.in or the official result portal upresults.nic.in.
On the homepage, look for the link that says "UP Board Class 10 High School Result 2026" or "UP Board Class 12 Intermediate Result 2026".
Click on the relevant result link as per your class to open the login page.
Enter your UP Board roll number and district/school code in the specified fields exactly as printed on the admit card.
Verify the entered details and click on the "Submit" or "View Result" button.
Your UP Board Class 10th or 12th Result 2026 marksheet will appear on the screen with subject-wise marks, total marks and result status.
Download the online marksheet and take a printout for future admission, scholarship or documentation purposes until the original marksheet is issued by the school.
